sharc
Documentation développeur
IUnsteadyRegularGridData.h
1 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_EXPRESSIONS_UNSTEADYREGULARGRIDDATA_IUNSTEADYREGULARGRIDDATA_H
2 #define ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_EXPRESSIONS_UNSTEADYREGULARGRIDDATA_IUNSTEADYREGULARGRIDDATA_H
3 /* Author : dechaiss at Tue Apr 13 13:26:02 2010
4  * Generated by createNew
5  * IFunctionR4vR1 implementation dealing with values given on a regular Cartesian grid
6  * for different times t.
7  * Data are read in a file by method setPoints(file_name).
8  * IUnsteadyRegularGridData f(x,y,z,t) = interpolates in space and time the given data.
9  * The implementation is done in a template class UnsteadyRegularGridDataT<Interpolator>
10  * Interface is created to avoid template manipulation to make it easier.
11  */
12 
13 #include <arcane/ArcaneTypes.h>
14 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Expressions/IFunctionR4vR1.h"
15 
16 // Structure used to store grid type enumeration
17 struct RegularGridType
18 {
19  enum eRegularGridType
20  {
21  UniformGrid, NonUniformGrid
22  };
23 
24  enum class GridDimension {
25  eUndefined,
26  e2D,
27  e2DT,
28  e3D,
29  e3DT
30  };
31 };
32 
33 // Interface used to handle UnsteadyGridDataT<T>
34 class IUnsteadyRegularGridData : public IFunctionR4vR1
35 {
36 public:
38  IUnsteadyRegularGridData()
39  {
40  ;
41  }
42 
44  virtual ~IUnsteadyRegularGridData() { }
45 
46 public:
47 
49  virtual void init() = 0;
50 
52  virtual void setRegularGridType(const RegularGridType::eRegularGridType& grid_type) = 0;
53 
55  virtual RegularGridType::GridDimension setPoints(const String& file_name) = 0;
56 
58  virtual void printGrid() const = 0;
59 
61  virtual String getFileName() const = 0;
62 
64  virtual RegularGridType::eRegularGridType getGridType() const = 0;
65 };
66 
67 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_EXPRESSIONS_UNSTEADYREGULARGRIDDATA_IUNSTEADYREGULARGRIDDATA_H */
